---
title: "Einar Paz"
subtitle: "Department of Economics <br> The University of Texas at Austin"
about: 
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:einarpaz@utexas.edu
    # - icon: mortarboard-fill
    #   text: Google Scholar
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOURID
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: cv.pdf
    # - icon: github
    #   text: GitHub
    #   href: https://github.com/yourusername
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/einar-paz-6a639aa2
---

Welcome!

I am a PhD student in Economics at [The University of Texas at Austin](https://liberalarts.utexas.edu/economics/){target="_blank"}.

My research interests are in macroeconomics, behavioral macroeconomics, monetary economics, and labor economics.
